Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Secluded Trajectory
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +22% (augmented)
Pack Size: +22% (augmented)
Monster Effectiveness: +13% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +80% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 80
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Thunderous" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters deal 17(15-19)% of Damage as Extra Lightning
{ Prefix Modifier "Impacting" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 96(90-100)% increased Stun Buildup
{ Prefix Modifier "Venomous" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 27(27-33)% chance to Poison on Hit
{ Suffix Modifier "Sleet" (Tier: 1) }
Area has patches of Chilled Ground
{ Suffix Modifier "of Hexwarding" (Tier: 1) }
45(50-40)% less effect of Curses on Monsters
{ Suffix Modifier "of Drought" (Tier: 1) }
Players gain 31(35-30)% reduced Flask Charges
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
--------
Corrupted
